Name: MOD-Navigation-SideNav-Functional: Verify 'Back to platform' link redirects user to the Diligent One Platform launchpad
Precondition: User has valid System Admin credentials. Application is accessible at [MODERNIZED_APPLICATION_URL]. UI-Workroom workroom exists at /workrooms/5732.
Objective: To verify clicking 'Back to platform' in the new-style side navigation exits BoardEffect and navigates to the Diligent One Platform launchpad at https://mod-lab-auto.home.diligentoneplatform-dev.com.
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Navigate to [MODERNIZED_APPLICATION_URL]
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Login page is displayed at the OIDC domain. 'Sign in to Diligent One Platform' heading is visible with 'Email' and 'Password' input fields and 'Sign in' button.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Enter login email in the 'Email' field
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Email value is populated in the 'Email' field.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Enter password in the 'Password' field
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Password is entered and displayed as masked dots.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Click 'Sign in' button
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=button name="Sign in" | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: User is redirected to the BoardEffect Home page.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Navigate directly to the UI-Workroom workroom page
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Workroom home page is displayed at /workrooms/5732. Page heading 'UI-Workroom' (h1) is visible.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Click 'Side navigation' button in the top banner to open the side navigation drawer
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=button name="Side navigation" | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Side navigation dialog opens (role=dialog). Navigation drawer containing all navigation links is visible.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Verify 'Back to platform' link is visible in the side navigation
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=link name="Back to platform" | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: 'Back to platform' link is visible in the top section of the side navigation.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Click 'Back to platform' link
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=link name="Back to platform" | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: User is navigated away from BoardEffect to the Diligent One Platform launchpad.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Verify the page URL is the Diligent One Platform launchpad
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Page URL is https://mod-lab-auto.home.diligentoneplatform-dev.com. Launchpad page is displayed and accessible, confirming the user has exited BoardEffect.

Name: MOD-Navigation-SideNav-Functional: Verify 'Home' link navigates to the Home page and displays the 'Home' h1 heading

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Enter login email in the 'Email' field
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Email value is populated.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Enter password in the 'Password' field
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Password is entered.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Click 'Sign in' button
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=button name="Sign in" | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: User is redirected to the BoardEffect Home page.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Navigate directly to the UI-Workroom workroom page
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Workroom page is displayed at /workrooms/5732 with h1 heading 'UI-Workroom'.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Click 'Side navigation' button to open the side navigation drawer
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=button name="Side navigation" | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Side navigation dialog opens.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Click 'Home' link in the side navigation
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: User is navigated to the Home page. URL changes to /home-new. Page title is 'Welcome to BoardEffect'.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Verify 'Home' link is visible in the side navigation
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: 'Home' link is present in the side navigation.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Click 'Open profile menu' button
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=button name="Open profile menu" | value: none

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: User is logged out and redirected to the login page.

Name: MOD-Navigation-SideNav-Functional: Verify Workrooms accordion expands and collapses with workgroup and workroom drill-down
Precondition: User has valid System Admin credentials. 'UI-Workgroup' exists containing 'UI-Workroom' at /workrooms/5732 and 'Non-UI-Workroom' at /workrooms/5768. Application is accessible at [MODERNIZED_APPLICATION_URL].
Objective: To verify the 'Workrooms' button expands and collapses the workgroup tree and clicking a workgroup expands its workrooms and clicking a workroom navigates to its homepage with a [selected] active state on the treeitem.
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Navigate to [MODERNIZED_APPLICATION_URL]
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Login page is displayed.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Enter login email in the 'Email' field
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Email value is populated.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Enter password in the 'Password' field
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Password is entered.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Click 'Sign in' button
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=button name="Sign in" | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: User is redirected to the BoardEffect Home page.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Navigate directly to the UI-Workroom workroom page
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Workroom home page is displayed.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Click 'Side navigation' button
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=button name="Side navigation" | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Side navigation dialog opens.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Verify 'Workrooms' button is visible and in collapsed state
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: 'Workrooms' button is visible in the side nav. Workgroup tree is not shown (button does not have [expanded] attribute).

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Click 'Workrooms' button
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: 'Workrooms' section expands. A tree element is rendered below showing available workgroups.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Verify 'UI-Workgroup' treeitem is visible in the expanded Workrooms tree
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: 'UI-Workgroup' treeitem is visible in the expanded Workrooms tree.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Click 'UI-Workgroup' treeitem to expand it
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: 'UI-Workgroup' expands. Nested workroom treeitems 'Non-UI-Workroom' and 'UI-Workroom' are visible as children.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Verify 'Non-UI-Workroom' and 'UI-Workroom' treeitems are both visible under 'UI-Workgroup'
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Both 'Non-UI-Workroom' (treeitem) and 'UI-Workroom' (treeitem) are visible as children of the expanded 'UI-Workgroup'.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Click 'UI-Workroom' treeitem
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: User is navigated to UI-Workroom workroom homepage. URL is /workrooms/5732.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Verify workroom homepage heading 'UI-Workroom' (h1) is displayed and 'Home' workroom tab is selected
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=heading level=1 name="UI-Workroom" | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: h1 heading 'UI-Workroom' is displayed. Workroom navigation tab 'Home' is selected (role=tab name="Home" selected). URL is /workrooms/5732.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Click 'Side navigation' button to reopen the side navigation drawer
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=button name="Side navigation" | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Side navigation dialog reopens with Workrooms tree and 'UI-Workgroup' still expanded.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Verify 'UI-Workroom' treeitem has the active selected state in the navigation tree
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=treeitem name="UI-Workroom" selected | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: 'UI-Workroom' treeitem has [selected] attribute indicating it is the currently active workroom.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Click 'UI-Workgroup' treeitem to collapse it
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=treeitem name="UI-Workgroup" expanded | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: 'UI-Workgroup' collapses. Nested workroom treeitems are hidden from view.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Click 'Workrooms' button to collapse the entire Workrooms section
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=button name="Workrooms" expanded | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: 'Workrooms' section collapses. Workgroup tree is no longer visible in the side navigation.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Verify 'Workrooms' button is in collapsed state and no workgroups are visible
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: 'Workrooms' button is present without [expanded] attribute. All workgroups and workrooms are hidden confirming full collapse.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Click 'Open profile menu' button
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=button name="Open profile menu" | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Profile menu opens.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Click 'Sign Out' link
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=link name="Sign Out" | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: User is logged out and redirected to the login page.

Name: MOD-Navigation-SideNav-Security: Verify 'Library' navigates to the Library page and is hidden for a user with Deactivate Resources permission
Precondition: System Admin credentials valid. Board Member 14 account ([MODERNIZED_BOARD_MEMBER_14_USEREMAIL]) has 'Deactivate Resources' permission pre-enabled — no permission change required before this test.
Objective: To verify clicking 'Library' in the new-style side navigation takes System Admin to /library showing global resources and workgroup folders and to verify the 'Library' link is absent from the side navigation for a user with the Deactivate Resources permission.
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Navigate to [MODERNIZED_APPLICATION_URL]
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Login page is displayed.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Enter login email for System Admin in the 'Email' field
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Email value is populated.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Enter password in the 'Password' field
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Password is entered.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Click 'Sign in' button
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=button name="Sign in" | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: System Admin is redirected to the Home page.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Navigate to the UI-Workroom workroom page
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Workroom page is displayed at /workrooms/5732.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Click 'Side navigation' button
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=button name="Side navigation" | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Side navigation dialog opens.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Click 'Library' link in the side navigation
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=link text="Library" within role=dialog | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: User is navigated to the Library page. URL is /library. Page title is 'Library'.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Verify Library page h1 heading 'Library' is displayed
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=heading level=1 name="Library" | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: 'Library' h1 heading is visible confirming the Library page has loaded.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Verify Library page subheading is displayed
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=heading level=2 name="Browse resources, workgroup and workroom collections, private and secured files" | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Subheading 'Browse resources, workgroup and workroom collections, private and secured files' is visible.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Verify 'Resource library' folder row is visible in the Library table
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=row name="Resource library" | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: 'Resource library' row is listed in the Library table.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Verify 'UI-Workgroup' workgroup row is visible with a 'Workgroup' label
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=row name="UI-Workgroup Workgroup" | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: 'UI-Workgroup' row is visible with a 'Workgroup' type label confirming workgroup folders are listed on the Library page.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Click 'Open profile menu' button
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=button name="Open profile menu" | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Profile menu opens.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Click 'Sign Out' link
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=link name="Sign Out" | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: System Admin is logged out. Login page is displayed.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Navigate to [MODERNIZED_APPLICATION_URL]
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Login page is displayed.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Enter login email for Board Member 14 in the 'Email' field
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Email value is populated.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Enter password in the 'Password' field
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Password is entered.

Name: MOD-Navigation-SideNav-Functional: Verify 'Minutes' link opens the Minutes application in a new browser tab
Precondition: User has valid System Admin credentials. Application is accessible at [MODERNIZED_APPLICATION_URL].
Objective: To verify clicking 'Minutes' in the new-style side navigation opens the Minutes application in a new browser tab and the original tab remains unchanged on the current page.
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Navigate to [MODERNIZED_APPLICATION_URL]
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Login page is displayed.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Enter login email in the 'Email' field
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Email value is populated.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Enter password in the 'Password' field
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Password is entered.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Click 'Sign in' button
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=button name="Sign in" | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: User is redirected to the BoardEffect Home page.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Navigate directly to the UI-Workroom workroom page
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Workroom page is displayed at /workrooms/5732.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Click 'Side navigation' button
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=button name="Side navigation" | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Side navigation dialog opens.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Verify 'Minutes' link is visible in the side navigation with an external link icon indicator
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: 'Minutes' link is visible in the side navigation. An external link indicator icon (img element) is present after the 'Minutes' label indicating it opens outside the current tab.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Click 'Minutes' link
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: A new browser tab opens. The browser now has 2 tabs open. The new tab navigates to https://minutes-orca01.diligentdatasystems.com/api/launch.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Verify the new tab URL points to the Minutes application
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: New tab URL is https://minutes-orca01.diligentdatasystems.com/api/launch or a redirect thereof. Minutes application is loading or loaded in the new tab.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Verify the original tab remains on the workroom page unchanged
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Original tab URL is still /workrooms/5732. Workroom page content is unchanged — h1 heading 'UI-Workroom' is still visible. The original tab was not navigated away.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Close the Minutes browser tab and switch back to the original tab
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Browser returns to a single open tab showing the workroom page at /workrooms/5732.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Click 'Open profile menu' button
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=button name="Open profile menu" | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Profile menu opens.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Click 'Sign Out' link
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=link name="Sign Out" | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: User is logged out and redirected to the login page.
